title: Aleuritopteris mairei
taxonomy: Aleuritopteris mairei is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. The genus Aleuritopteris is a part of the Pteridophyta division, which comprises all vascular plants with a fern-like structure. It is a type of deciduous fern, characterized by its simple leaves with a pinnate or bipinnate venation pattern. The classification of Aleuritopteris mairei places it within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Tracheophyta. Further classification includes it as a member of the class Polypodiopsida and the order Pteridales.
